About

I am a Data Scientist at Flipkart. I work with the Retail and Private Label team. Before Flipkart, I finished my masters degree from IIT Madras and worked on Natural Language Generation from structured data. Prior to my masters I worked as an Analog circuit designer working on the design of power management IC’s. Before that, obtained my undergraduate degree from BITS Pilani.
